title: Saturday
content:
Now with the almost finished task make haste.
    So near the night thou hast no time to waste.
    Post up accounts, and let thy Soul's eyes look
    For flaws and errors in Life's ledger-book.
        When labours cease,
         How sweet the sense of peace!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Ella Wheeler Wilcox delivers a powerful performance in "Saturday"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
